name: http_request
description: Full-featured HTTP client supporting GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE, HEAD, and OPTIONS methods. Handles JSON bodies, custom headers, bearer/basic authentication, query parameters, and automatic response parsing. Use web_fetch for simple GET requests; use this tool when you need non-GET methods, auth tokens, or structured request bodies.

params.description: Optional dict of URL query parameters appended to the URL.

json_body.description: Request body as a JSON-serializable value. Automatically sets Content-Type: application/json. Mutually exclusive with form_data and body.

form_data.description: Request body as form fields. Sets Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded. Mutually exclusive with json_body and body.

body.description: Raw string request body. Use when json_body and form_data are not appropriate.

timeout_seconds.description: Request timeout in seconds. Defaults to 30.

follow_redirects.description: Whether to follow HTTP redirects. Defaults to true.

auth_bearer.description: Bearer token to include in the Authorization header (e.g., a JWT or API key).

return_format.description: How to parse the response body. 'auto' detects from Content-Type header.
